title: Array assignment and comparison don't use full array value

features.name: unpacked array inequality comparison
features.description: Code should include an inequality comparison (!=) between two unpacked arrays of the same type where both arrays have multiple elements

features.name: unpacked array equality comparison
features.description: Code should include an equality comparison (==) between two unpacked arrays of the same type where both arrays have multiple elements

features.name: array to element assignment
features.description: Code should include an assignment from an unpacked array to a packed element (reg or logic) of matching element type
